caption: A news broadcast features a man in a white short-sleeved shirt sitting atop a vehicle, surrounded by a crowd and flags. In the initial frames, he remains seated while other individuals are visible around him, including a man in a darker shirt partially obscured in the foreground. As the sequence progresses, the man in white stands up and raises his arm. The screen is overlaid with news graphics, including a red header with the text "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. Small inset portraits identify individuals as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," "मंत्री विजेंद्र यादव," and "श्रवण कुमार." A prominent "BREAKING NEWS" banner runs across the bottom, though the lettering becomes distorted and glitches in the later frames. A timestamp in the bottom right corner consistently displays "10:09 PM." The background shows a blurred crowd and several orange and green flags.
